meta.title: Cart
meta.description: Review your purchasing cart before checkout.

page.label: Purchasing cart
page.title: Review items and submit order
page.description: Confirm item quantities and domestic shipping first. Value-added services are now selected at checkout before creating the order.

cart.confirmDelete: Remove this item from your cart?

empty.title: Your cart is waiting.
empty.description: Add a product from search or detail pages to create a purchasing order.

summary.title: Checkout preview
summary.notice: This preview only includes the fees charged when you submit the order. International shipping is paid later after warehouse processing.
summary.savedAddressNotice: {count} saved shipping address(es) available. Choose the final delivery address at checkout.
summary.noAddressNotice: Add a shipping address in User Center before paying. Orders can still be submitted for review.
